positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for platypus_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~platypus(X0) | ~has_teeth(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    human(alice)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_teeth(sK1)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    platypus(perry)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    platypus(sK1)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    has_teeth(alice)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~has_teeth(perry)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~human(X0) | has_teeth(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define reptile(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
